disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Numbness and loss of feeling in both feet with pins-and-needles, and stumbling/unsteady walking
trigger_question_examples: What's troubling you most right now?
Tell me about the numbness and the stumbling.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't feel my feet at all — they're numb with pins and needles — and I keep stumbling like I'm drunk. My legs feel like they aren't mine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning, sore tongue making it hard to eat
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned your tongue — what's it like?
Any problems with your mouth or eating?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My tongue burns so badly I can hardly eat — it feels raw and looks smooth and red.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several months of profound tiredness, low energy and reduced exercise tolerance
trigger_question_examples: How have your energy levels been over the last few months?
Have you been more tired or breathless than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been completely worn out for months — no energy, and I get puffed and a bit faint doing things that used to be easy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The numbness began in the toes about 3 months ago and has crept up both legs toward the knees, symmetrically
trigger_question_examples: When and where did the numbness first start, and how has it spread?
Is it in both legs equally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started in my toes about three months ago and has slowly climbed up both legs to around my knees — it's the same on both sides.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Had a fall tonight while walking and is now on the floor, unable to stand or balance
trigger_question_examples: What happened tonight?
Can you stand or walk at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I fell over tonight when I tried to walk and now I'm stuck on the floor — I can't get up or keep my balance.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Family reports new, worsening forgetfulness and memory problems over the last few weeks
trigger_question_examples: Has anyone noticed changes in your memory or thinking?
How has your memory been lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My adult child says my memory has got a lot worse these last few weeks — I keep forgetting things.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Strict vegan diet for over 40 years with no vitamin supplementation of any kind
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about your usual diet?
Do you take any vitamins or supplements?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been a strict vegan for over forty years and I've never taken any supplements or vitamins.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Family notes she looks pale and slightly yellow-tinged in the skin
trigger_question_examples: Has your skin colour changed at all?
Does she look pale or yellowish to you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My adult child says I look really pale and a bit yellow in the skin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Balance collapses completely in the dark or with eyes closed; worse when unable to watch the feet
trigger_question_examples: Is your balance worse in the dark or with your eyes shut?
Does watching your feet help you walk?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: In the dark or if I close my eyes I lose my balance completely — I have to keep the lights on and stare at my feet to move at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No loss of bowel or bladder control, and can still move both legs; did not strike the head in the fall
trigger_question_examples: Any loss of control of your bladder or bowels?
Can you still move your legs? Did you hit your head?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't wet or soiled myself, I can still move my legs even though they're numb, and I didn't hit my head — I went down slowly onto the carpet.
